name: Add or Remove Audio from Video
description: Add audio to a video or remove its sound. Copy audio from another video or audio file, handle different lengths, and export MP4 locally in your browser.

privacy.note: SafeWebTool tools are designed to process user data locally in the browser.

howToUse: Choose the video whose picture you want to keep
Pick Add audio or Remove audio
For Add audio, choose a second video or audio file as the sound source
Click the process button and download the MP4 result
useCase: Use when you need to mute a video, add sound to a silent video, or copy audio from one video into another without uploading private media.
exampleTasks: Use audio from one video in another video.
Remove audio from a video and download a silent MP4.
Add an audio file to a silent video while keeping files in the browser.
automationNotes: Prefer the stable selectors in this contract over visible text where possible.
Wait for selectors.ready before interacting with the tool UI.
Do not upload private user media to a remote agent service; operate the browser-local UI instead.
